pages.title: Elf
pages.text: Tall, slim. Height 1.05, width 0.95. Sleepless, fey-touched. Picking Elf opens a second screen where you also pick a lineage.

pages.title: Shared traits
pages.text: $(bold)Low-Light Vision.$(/) Faint light is enough. Not full darkvision; disabled underwater.$(br2)$(bold)Trance.$(/) You do not sleep, and phantoms ignore you.$(br2)$(bold)Frail.$(/) -2 max health (-1 heart).$(br2)$(bold)Light-Footed.$(/) Reduced knockback resistance.

pages.title: Pick a lineage
pages.text: After choosing Elf, a second screen offers three lineages:$(br)$(li)$(l:races/elf_high)High Elf$(/l) — arcane caster.$(li)$(l:races/elf_wood)Wood Elf$(/l) — ranged scout.$(li)$(l:races/elf_sea)Sea Elf$(/l) — amphibious diver.$(br)Lineage traits stack on top of the shared elf traits.
